candidate_definitions.text: Build, cache, and run CLI tools scoped in Cargo.toml rather than installing globally. Stop the version drifts across your team, keep it all in sync within your project!
Cargo downloads your Rust project’s dependencies and compiles your project.
“Zero setup” cross compilation and “cross testing” of Rust crates
🦀 How to minimize Rust binary size 📦 https://github.com/johnthagen/min-sized-rust
Checks all your documentation for spelling and grammar mistakes with hunspell and a nlprule based checker for grammar
Subcommand to show result of macro expansion
Build library for finding native libraries in vcpkg for Rust - Windows (msvc), Linux and macOS
📜 Cargo plugin to generate list of all licenses for a crate 🦀
❌ Cargo plugin for linting your dependencies 🦀
The RustSec Advisory Database is a repository of security advisories filed
The sysroot manager that lets you build and customize `std`
Rust task runner and build tool.
Cargo subcommand `release`: everything about releasing a rust crate.
A cargo subcommand to fetch the source code of a Rust crate
cargo-clone can be used to fetch the source code of a Rust crate from a registry.
A utility for managing cargo dependencies from the command line.
This tool extends [Cargo](http://doc.crates.io/) to allow you to add, remove, and upgrade dependencies by modifying your `Cargo.toml` file from the command line.
Watches over your Cargo project's source.
A cargo-subcommand to speed up Rust Docker builds using Docker layer caching.
Periodically build some cargo binary packages and publish them to my personal pacman repo
SuperJSON Plugin for Next.js Pages and Components
Library to easily and effortlessly integrate Cargo projects with Nix.
Easily and effortlessly integrate Cargo projects with Nix.
List and diff the public API of Rust library crates between releases and commits. Detect breaking API changes and semver violations via CI or a CLI.

A cargo plugin to easily build Swift packages from Rust code
Compile Rust projects with the Android NDK without hassle
Wraps `cargo install` for better local, non-conflicting installation
A neovim plugin that helps managing crates.io dependencies
Handle Cargo dependencies like a Rustavimean.
When maintaining Rust projects, this plugin helps with updating the dependencies
crates is an extension aims to help people to manage their dependencies for rust (crates.io & TOML).
